data.title: Elon Musk Cheers 'DOGE' Storm As Iconic Dogecoin Meme Associated With Department Of Government Efficiency Appears On Senate Floor
data.description: Elon Musk, tech mogul and head of the incoming "Department of Government Efficiency," celebrated the surprising appearance of an iconic DOGE meme in the U.S. Senate on Thursday.

data.title: Nvidia's AI Growth Boosts Advantest's Strategic Position In AI Chip Supply Chain, Stock Shows Strong Correlation With Jensen Huang-Led Tech Giant
data.description: Japanese semiconductor testing equipment maker Advantest Corp. has emerged as a key beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom, with its stock showing a remarkable 0.93 correlation coefficient with NVIDIA Corp. over the past three years, highlighting its strategic position in the AI chip supply chain.

data.title: Coinbase Subpoenaed Over Polymarket Involvement, Federal Agency Seeks Customer Information
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has issued a subpoena to cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) regarding its association with the prediction platform Polymarket, according to a Thursday report.

data.title: Nvidia Slams Biden's Country-Specific Chip Rules: 'Legacy That Will Be Criticized'
data.description: The proposed regulations would create three tiers of chip curbs, allowing some U.S. allies full access to American chips.

data.title: Ford Debuts Limited-Edition Mustang GTD Spirit Of America, New RTR Performance Model Amid Stock Pressure
data.description: Ford Motor Co. unveiled two new Mustang variants Thursday in Detroit, showcasing American performance innovation while the automaker's stock trades near its 52-week low of $9.49.
